infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CivicView needs camera access to attach photos to your report.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CivicView needs photo library access to attach photos to your report.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CivicView uses your location to pin the report on the map.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow CivicView to use your camera to take photos of issues.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow CivicView to access your photos to attach to reports.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: CivicView uses your location to pin the report on the map.
